metadata.title: Inflee.app - Generate Sales Leads with AI
metadata.description: AI platform for entrepreneurs and freelancers. Create e-books, promotional reels, and landing pages that attract clients on autopilot.
metadata.keywords: ai, lead generation, sales leads, e-book, promotional reels, freelancer, small business, landing page
metadata.ogDescription: AI platform for entrepreneurs and freelancers. Create e-books, promotional reels, and landing pages that attract clients on autopilot.

hero.subtitle: E-books, promotional reels, and landing pages — AI builds it all for you in minutes.
hero.benefit1: No need to hire a copywriter, designer, or video editor
hero.benefit2: No technical skills required — forget Canva and CapCut
hero.benefit3: No burning your budget on ads that don't convert
hero.subCta: 21-day free trial available. No credit card required to start.

title.part3: that attracts clients and grows your pipeline

howItWorks.subtitle: Stop wasting time creating materials manually. Launch your lead magnet — e-book, landing page, and promotional reels — today.

step1.title: 1. Create an expert e-book
step1.text: Enter a topic, paste a link to an article, or upload a PDF about your services. AI will create a professional e-book with a cover, table of contents, chapters, and illustrations. The perfect lead magnet that showcases your expertise and attracts potential clients.
details: Enter a topic and sources (link/PDF/your own text)
AI will generate the structure and content of chapters
Customize the content — you control every word
AI creates the cover and illustrations. You can also add your own
A ready lead magnet in minutes, not weeks

step2.title: 2. Generate a landing page
step2.text: Based on your e-book's content, AI will create a complete landing page with persuasive copy, a contact form, and CTA buttons. Customize colors, text, and layout to match your brand. Publish with one click — ready to collect leads.
details: AI writes persuasive landing page copy
Customize the content and colors to match your brand
Responsive design (works perfectly on phone and desktop)
Publish with a single click
Page accessible via link or QR code
Share and collect contacts from potential clients

step3.title: 3. Generate promotional reels
step3.text: AI will analyze your e-book's content and create a series of short, engaging video reels. Ready-to-post materials for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, or LinkedIn — no camera, no editing, no stress. Each reel drives viewers to your landing page.
details: AI creates reels based on your e-book's content
Ready to publish on Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook
No camera, no editing — AI generates everything
Each reel includes a call-to-action pointing to your landing page
Consistent content that builds your expert brand

step4.title: 4. Collect leads and sell
step4.text: Everyone who downloads your e-book is added to your pipeline of potential clients. Manage contacts, add notes, and track statuses. Export your database to Excel, CSV, or PDF and use it for email campaigns, SMS, or cold calling.
details: All contacts in a clean CRM interface
Statuses, notes, and tags for each lead
One-click export to Excel, PDF, or CSV
Real-time visit, download, and conversion statistics
Integration with popular email marketing systems coming soon

features.subtitle: Inflee.app is more than an AI generator. It's a complete platform for building your sales funnel — from lead magnets and content to managing your client pipeline.

feature1.title: Lead magnet ready in 5 minutes
feature1.text: Paste a link or upload text about your industry. AI will create a professional e-book that demonstrates your expertise and convinces potential clients to leave their contact info.

benefits.text: Save dozens of hours writing and designing
Professional material that builds client trust
Full control over the content at every stage
Export to PDF with a single click

feature2.title: Reels that attract clients
feature2.text: AI turns your e-book content into a series of short, engaging video reels. Ready-made social media content without a camera, without editing, without specialized skills.

benefits.text: Video content ready in minutes, not hours
Professional materials without a film crew
Perfect format for building reach and generating leads
Each reel drives traffic to your landing page

feature3.title: Landing page without coding
feature3.text: AI automatically writes persuasive copy for your landing page. Customize it to match your brand and publish with one click. The contact form works immediately.

benefits.text: Start collecting leads in minutes, not weeks
No fees for domain and hosting
Full control over the final look and content
High conversion rate thanks to a proven structure

feature4.title: Build your client pipeline
feature4.text: Every e-book download is a new lead in your database. Collect contact data and build your own list independent of social media algorithms or ad costs.

benefits.text: Your most valuable sales asset
Direct contact with interested prospects
Perfect base for follow-ups and sales offers
Export to formats compatible with CRMs and email tools

feature5.title: Convert leads into clients
feature5.text: Manage your lead database in an intuitive CRM. Track who downloaded materials, set statuses, add notes, and plan follow-ups — all in one place.

benefits.text: Clear view of every potential client
Statuses and notes for better sales pipeline management
Ready data for email, SMS, and cold calling campaigns
Zero commission from Inflee on your transactions

feature6.title: Scale your business
feature6.text: Your lead database is growing? Great! Export it to any system, automate your communication, and convert prospects into paying clients at scale.

benefits.text: Full control over your data
Scale your sales efforts without limits
Use collected contacts in any tool
Guarantee of a paid collaboration offer

faq1.q: How exactly does this easy sales funnel builder work?
faq1.a: Inflee is a complete automated lead generation tool for small businesses and freelancers. You simply define your niche by providing a title, subtitle, and optional sources (docs or links). The platform smoothly guides you from creating an e-book and a landing page, to generating promotional reels and managing leads in a CRM.

faq2.q: How does the AI ebook creator generate content, and can I edit it?
faq2.a: You are always in the driver's seat (human-in-the-loop approach). First, our AI ebook creator generates a table of contents which you can customize to your expectations. Once approved, the AI drafts the chapter content, which you can manually edit and refine at any time.

faq3.q: Where do I get the cover and illustrations for my AI lead magnet?
faq3.a: You don't need a designer. Based on your chapter content, the AI lead magnet generator automatically creates a stunning cover and matching chapter illustrations. You also have the option to upload your own custom graphics if you prefer.

faq4.q: Do I need my own domain to use the simple landing page builder?
faq4.a: No hosting is required. Once your e-book is created, one click generates a dedicated landing page hosted on inflee.app. After you customize the text, one more click makes it public and instantly ready to collect sales leads.

faq5.q: How does the reel generator work and what are the CTA options?
faq5.a: One click from your landing page takes you to the reel generator. You choose a male or female voiceover to read an intro encouraging downloads. You can add a reel headline, highlight key parts of your cover, and define the CTA: a traditional "Get e-book" button or a Manychat-ready "Comment to get" option.

faq6.q: How do I manage clients once I start getting sales leads with AI?
faq6.a: As soon as leads sign up, they are aggregated into our built-in, simple CRM. You can easily track your prospects, change their sales statuses, and add personal comments, giving you full control over your new clients.

finalCta.subtitle: Join entrepreneurs and freelancers who are already generating sales leads on autopilot. Your first lead magnet is just minutes away.
